overall.description: Cinematic gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 featuring a cowboy riding a horse through expansive grassland prairies. The character rides past wild horses, stops on a hilltop to survey the landscape, and continues through rolling hills with atmospheric haze obscuring distant mountains.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassland prairie with wild horse herd

events.description: begins riding horse through tall grass along a dirt trail
riding through dense tall grass and bushes that partially obscure the view

agents.ego_description: riding a horse along a dirt trail through tall grass, approaching and passing wild horses on both sides

notable_agents.action: wild horses grazing and walking through the tall grass
wild horses moving through the grassland

entered.detail: narrow dirt path winding through the grassland
tall green and yellow grass covering the rolling terrain
mountain range visible through atmospheric haze in the distance
low shrubs and scrub vegetation dotting the landscape
spiky yucca plants growing alongside the trail

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a third-person view following a cowboy riding through an expansive grassland prairie. Wild horses graze on both sides of the dirt trail as the rider moves through tall grass and scattered yucca plants, with hazy mountains visible in the distant background.

events.description: horse comes to a complete stop on the hilltop

agents.ego_description: stopped on a hilltop, looking around at the expansive grassland and distant mountains

segments.scene_description: The rider pauses on a hilltop vantage point, the horse standing still while surveying the open grassland. The wild horses from the previous segment are no longer visible, and the scene is quiet except for the ambient wind.

events.description: resuming steady ride through the open grassland

agents.ego_description: riding steadily through open grassland with scattered bushes and yucca plants

segments.scene_description: The rider continues at a steady pace through the open prairie, following the dirt trail through rolling terrain covered in tall grass. The landscape remains consistent with distant hazy mountains and scattered scrub vegetation.

events.description: terrain opens up to reveal expansive valley view as the path descends
descending the slope with the view widening to show rolling hills

agents.ego_description: riding downhill as the landscape opens up to reveal a wide valley with rolling grass-covered hills extending to the horizon

entered.detail: expansive view of a wide valley with rolling grass-covered hills
undulating green hills stretching into the distance
sparse trees dotting the distant hillsides

segments.scene_description: As the rider descends a grassy slope, the terrain opens dramatically to reveal a sweeping valley panorama. The path continues downward through shorter grass, with rolling hills extending to the horizon and distant mountains now visible to the right.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through an expansive grassland prairie that gradually opens into a sweeping valley panorama. It begins by following a cowboy riding a dirt trail through tall grass and yucca plants, passing wild horses grazing under the gaze of distant, hazy mountains. As the rider reaches a hilltop vantage point, the camera pauses in a moment of stillness to survey the quiet, open landscape. The scene then shifts back into motion as the rider continues across rolling terrain and scrub vegetation before descending a grassy slope. Finally, the terrain opens dramatically to reveal a wide valley with rolling hills extending to the horizon and mountains visible to the right.
